settingImageCompressionDesc: When enabled, images are compressed during conversion. When disabled, no compression is applied and image organization behavior is unchanged.
settingSaveSuffixDesc: Compressed images will be saved using the selected format.
settingResourceArchiveDesc: When disabled, compressed images are saved in the original image directory instead of the document archive directory.
settingDeleteOriginalDesc: When enabled, original images are deleted after conversion. When disabled, original images are kept.
resourceArchiveDisabled: Resource archiving disabled, compressed images will be saved to the original path
deleteOriginalDisabled: Delete original images disabled, originals will be kept
